---
id: get-channels-channel-id-detection-history-marker-detection-id
title: 'Get /channels/{channelId}/detection/history/{markerDetectionId}'
description: 'Get a detected ad-marker history entry by ID.'
sidebar_label: 'Get /channels/{channelId}/detection/history/{markerDetectionId}'
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: 'get api-method'

---

import MethodEndpoint from '@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint';
import ParamsDetails from '@theme/ParamsDetails';
import RequestSchema from '@theme/RequestSchema';
import StatusCodes from '@theme/StatusCodes';
import OperationTabs from '@theme/OperationTabs';
import TabItem from '@theme/TabItem';
import Heading from '@theme/Heading';
import Translate from '@docusaurus/Translate';

<Heading as={'h1'} className={'openapi__heading'} children={'Get /channels/{channelId}/detection/history/{markerDetectionId}'}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={'get'} path={'/api/v1/channels/{channelId}/detection/history/{markerDetectionId}'} context={'endpoint'}></MethodEndpoint>

Get a detected ad-marker history entry by ID.

<Heading id={'request'} as={'h2'} className={'openapi-tabs__heading'}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[
    { description: 'Identifier of the channel.', in: 'path', name: 'channelId', required: true, schema: { type: 'string' } },
    { description: 'Identifier of the marker detection record.', in: 'path', name: 'markerDetectionId', required: true, schema: { type: 'string' } },
  ]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema title={'Body'}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  responses={{
    '200': {
      content: {
        'application/json': {
          schema: {
            additionalProperties: false,
            properties: {
              action: {
                description:
                  'Outcome recorded for a detected marker: `CREATED` (a break was scheduled), `SKIPPED` (no break scheduled), or `FAILED` (scheduling failed).',
                enum: ['CREATED', 'SKIPPED', 'FAILED'],
                type: 'string',
              },
              breakId: { description: 'Identifier of the break scheduled from this detection, if one was created.', type: 'string' },
              createdAt: { description: 'Timestamp when the marker was detected, as an ISO 8601 datetime string.', type: 'string' },
              id: { description: 'Unique marker detection identifier.', type: 'string' },
              marker: { description: 'The raw marker detected in the stream manifest.', type: 'string' },
              markerRuleId: { description: 'Identifier of the marker rule that matched the detected marker, if any.', type: 'string' },
              originId: { description: 'Identifier of the origin whose polling detected the marker.', type: 'string' },
              reason: {
                description:
                  'Reason a detection was skipped or failed. Recent records use a typed detection reason; legacy records may carry a free-form string.',
                type: 'string',
              },
            },
            required: ['id', 'originId', 'action', 'marker', 'createdAt'],
            type: 'object',
          },
        },
      },
      description: 'Default Response',
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
